entities.name: SOYBEAN
entities.description: A legume crop grown in rotation with chickpea

entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: A legume crop grown in rotation with soybean

entities.name: VERTIC INCEPTISOL
entities.description: A type of soil characterized by shrink-swell properties

entities.name: SOIL DEPTH
entities.description: The vertical extent of the soil profile, categorized as shallow or medium-deep

entities.name: LANDFORM
entities.description: The physical configuration of the land surface

entities.name: BROADBED-AND-FURROW
entities.description: A land management system consisting of raised beds and furrows to manage water

entities.name: FLAT LANDFORM
entities.description: A traditional flat land surface management system

entities.name: PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The measure of crop output or yield per unit area

entities.name: RESOURCE-USE EFFICIENCY
entities.description: The efficiency with which crops utilize resources like water and light

entities.name: LEAF AREA INDEX
entities.description: A dimensionless quantity that characterizes plant canopies

entities.name: LIGHT INTERCEPTION
entities.description: The amount of solar radiation captured by the crop canopy

entities.name: SEED YIELD
entities.description: The weight of seeds produced per unit area

entities.name: RUN-OFF
entities.description: The portion of rainfall that flows over the land surface

entities.name: PROFILE WATER CONTENT
entities.description: The amount of water stored within the soil profile

entities.name: DEEP DRAINAGE
entities.description: Water that moves downward beyond the root zone

entities.name: EVAPOTRANSPIRATION
entities.description: The combined process of water evaporation from soil and transpiration from plants

entities.name: INFILTRATION
entities.description: The process by which water on the ground surface enters the soil

entities.name: SOYBEAN-CHICKPEA ROTATION
entities.description: The practice of alternating the cultivation of soybean and chickpea

entities.name: WATERSHED-BASED FARMING SYSTEM
entities.description: An agricultural approach managed at the watershed level to optimize water use

entities.name: SUPPLEMENTAL IRRIGATION
entities.description: The application of additional water to crops to supplement rainfall

entities.name: SUSTAINABILITY
entities.description: The ability of the farming system to maintain productivity over the long term

entities.name: PATANCHERU
entities.description: The location of the ICRISAT Centre in Andhra Pradesh

entities.name: ANDHRA PRADESH
entities.description: A state in India

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where the study was conducted
